queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating effects of maintaining critical accounts or multiple existing credits within a borrower's credit history on default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: The contribution of lacking a checking account to elevated credit risk drivers and increased loan default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of a used car.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into the risk-reducing impact of financing the purchase of a used vehicle on borrower creditworthiness and default probability.
